Container.Name: claude-code-dock
Container.Overview:
Run Claude Code (@anthropic-ai/claude-code) persistently on a 24/7 server. Boots inside a tmux session so it survives disconnects and restarts, and reconnects via the Console tab (Shell field: claude-console) or SSH. Credentials, workspace, and settings persist in bind-mounted paths across container restarts and updates. Each container is one isolated session — add the container again under a different name to run a second project with its own workspace and REMOTE_SESSION_NAME, sharing the same Claude login by pointing both at the same Claude Config parent path.
Requires a one-time interactive login on first start: open the Console (or attach via SSH) and follow Claude Code's own authentication prompt. No credentials are ever handled by this template.

Config.Name: Workspace
Config.Description: Your project files. Prefer cache/SSD over the array for I/O-heavy work.

Config.Name: Claude Config
Config.Description: This session's Claude Code credentials/settings (equivalent to CONFIG_BASE_PATH/REMOTE_SESSION_NAME in the Docker Compose setup). Use a distinct subfolder per container -- never point two containers at the same path.

Config.Name: Shared Config (optional)
Config.Description: Optional: a folder with a shared CLAUDE.md and commands/ applied to every session. Leave the host path empty/unused if you don't need this.

Config.Name: AUTO_START_MODE
Config.Description: interactive (Claude in a terminal, default), remote (Claude Remote Control as the main process), or shell (debugging).

Config.Name: CLAUDE_AUTO_APPROVE
Config.Description: true enables --dangerously-skip-permissions (no per-action confirmation). false asks for approval before each action.

Config.Name: REMOTE_SESSION_NAME
Config.Description: Required. Unique name for this session -- shown in startup logs and used as the tmux/remote-control session identifier. Two containers must never share this value.

Config.Name: CLAUDE_EXTRA_ARGS
Config.Description: Extra arguments appended to the claude command, e.g. --model sonnet. Space-separated only -- no quoted args with internal spaces.

Config.Name: GITHUB_TOKEN
Config.Description: GitHub Personal Access Token (scope: repo) for git push/pull authentication (optional). Leave empty for public-repo read-only or SSH-based workflows.

Config.Name: GIT_REPO_URL
Config.Description: HTTPS URL of a repo to auto-clone into /workspace on first start, only if the workspace is empty (optional).
